---
title: "08b — Publication Figures and Tables: Antisemitism (Multi-Figure)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE,
                      fig.width = 8, fig.height = 6, dpi = 300)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

```{r libraries}
library(data.table)
library(arrow)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(fect)
library(knitr)
```

## Helper functions

```{r helpers}
# Reuse helpers from step 08
extract_fect_att <- function(model) {
  att <- as.numeric(model$att.avg)
  se <- if (!is.null(model$att.avg.boot) && length(model$att.avg.boot) > 1) {
    sd(model$att.avg.boot)
  } else NA_real_
  list(att = att, se = se,
       ci_lo = att - 1.96 * se, ci_hi = att + 1.96 * se,
       p = 2 * pnorm(-abs(att / se)))
}

extract_did_att <- function(model) {
  avg <- model$est.avg
  if (is.null(avg)) return(list(att = NA_real_, se = NA_real_,
                                 ci_lo = NA_real_, ci_hi = NA_real_, p = NA_real_))
  null_to_na <- function(x) if (is.null(x)) NA_real_ else x
  list(att = null_to_na(avg$ATT.avg), se = null_to_na(avg$S.E.),
       ci_lo = null_to_na(avg$CI.lower), ci_hi = null_to_na(avg$CI.upper),
       p = null_to_na(avg$p.value))
}

sig_stars <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return("")
  if (p < 0.001) return("$^{***}$")
  if (p < 0.01) return("$^{**}$")
  if (p < 0.05) return("$^{*}$")
  return("")
}

# Newspaper-to-state mapping (optional)
np_states_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "newspaper_states.csv")
HAS_NP_STATES <- file.exists(np_states_path)
if (HAS_NP_STATES) {
  np_states <- fread(np_states_path, encoding = "UTF-8")
  np_states <- np_states[state != ""]
}
```

## Per-figure results tables

```{r horizontal-tables}
forest_data_antisem <- list()

for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  fig <- FIGURES[[fig_key]]

  panel_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, paste0("did_panel_antisem_", fig_key, ".parquet"))
  if (!file.exists(panel_path)) next

  message("\n", strrep("=", 60))
  message("Building antisemitism table for: ", fig$name)
  message(strrep("=", 60))

  panel <- as.data.table(read_parquet(panel_path))
  n_obs <- nrow(panel)
  n_units <- uniqueN(panel$newspaper_id)
  n_treated_units <- uniqueN(panel[!is.na(treat_date), newspaper_id])
  n_control_units <- n_units - n_treated_units

  # Collect estimates from 3 models: TWFE(Imp.), MC, C&S
  model_specs <- list(
    fe = list(
      file = paste0("fect_fe_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"),
      label = "TWFE (Imp.)", type = "fect"
    ),
    mc = list(
      file = paste0("fect_mc_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"),
      label = "MC", type = "fect"
    ),
    cs = list(
      file = paste0("did_cs_notyet_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"),
      label = "C\\&S", type = "did"
    )
  )

  att_vals <- se_vals <- ci_lo_vals <- ci_hi_vals <- p_vals <- rep(NA_real_, 3)
  names(att_vals) <- names(se_vals) <- names(ci_lo_vals) <-
    names(ci_hi_vals) <- names(p_vals) <- names(model_specs)

  for (mkey in names(model_specs)) {
    spec <- model_specs[[mkey]]
    mpath <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, spec$file)
    if (!file.exists(mpath)) next

    m <- readRDS(mpath)
    res <- if (spec$type == "fect") extract_fect_att(m) else extract_did_att(m)
    att_vals[mkey]  <- res$att
    se_vals[mkey]   <- res$se
    ci_lo_vals[mkey] <- res$ci_lo
    ci_hi_vals[mkey] <- res$ci_hi
    p_vals[mkey]    <- res$p
    rm(m); gc()
  }

  if (all(is.na(att_vals))) {
    message("  No models found, skipping table.")
    rm(panel); gc()
    next
  }

  # Store MC result for forest plot
  forest_key <- if (!is.na(att_vals["mc"])) "mc" else "fe"
  if (!is.na(att_vals[forest_key])) {
    forest_data_antisem[[fig_key]] <- data.table(
      figure = fig$name,
      att    = att_vals[forest_key],
      se     = se_vals[forest_key],
      ci_lo  = ci_lo_vals[forest_key],
      ci_hi  = ci_hi_vals[forest_key]
    )
  }

  # Build LaTeX table
  active <- !is.na(att_vals)
  active_keys <- names(model_specs)[active]
  active_labels <- sapply(model_specs[active_keys], `[[`, "label")
  ncols <- sum(active)
  col_spec <- paste(rep("c", ncols), collapse = "")

  tex_lines <- c(
    "\\begin{table}[htbp]",
    paste0("\\caption{Antisemitism ATT: ", fig$name,
           "\\label{tab:", fig_key, "-antisem}}"),
    "\\centering", "\\small",
    paste0("\\begin{tabular}{l", col_spec, "}"),
    "\\toprule",
    paste0(" & ", paste(active_labels, collapse = " & "), " \\\\"),
    "\\midrule"
  )

  att_cells <- sapply(active_keys, function(k) {
    paste0(sprintf("%.4f", att_vals[k]), sig_stars(p_vals[k]))
  })
  tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
    paste0("ATT & ", paste(att_cells, collapse = " & "), " \\\\"))

  se_cells <- sapply(active_keys, function(k) {
    paste0("(", sprintf("%.4f", se_vals[k]), ")")
  })
  tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
    paste0(" & ", paste(se_cells, collapse = " & "), " \\\\"))

  ci_cells <- sapply(active_keys, function(k) {
    paste0("[", sprintf("%.4f", ci_lo_vals[k]), ", ", sprintf("%.4f", ci_hi_vals[k]), "]")
  })
  tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
    paste0("95\\% CI & ", paste(ci_cells, collapse = " & "), " \\\\"),
    "\\midrule")

  obs_cells <- rep(formatC(n_obs, format = "d", big.mark = ","), ncols)
  tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
    paste0("Observations & ", paste(obs_cells, collapse = " & "), " \\\\"))

  treat_cells <- rep(formatC(n_treated_units, format = "d", big.mark = ","), ncols)
  tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
    paste0("Treated & ", paste(treat_cells, collapse = " & "), " \\\\"))

  control_cells <- rep(formatC(n_control_units, format = "d", big.mark = ","), ncols)
  tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
    paste0("Never-treated & ", paste(control_cells, collapse = " & "), " \\\\"))

  tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
    "\\bottomrule", "\\end{tabular}",
    "\\\\[2pt]",
    paste0("\\footnotesize\\textit{Note:} ",
           "$^{*}p<0.05$, $^{**}p<0.01$, $^{***}p<0.001$. ",
           "Outcome: RoBERTa antisemitism probability (non-figure articles). ",
           "Study window: ", fig$study_start, "--", fig$study_end, "."),
    "\\end{table}"
  )

  tex_string <- paste(tex_lines, collapse = "\n")
  save_table(tex_string, paste0("table_antisem_", fig_key, "_results"))
  message("  Saved table: table_antisem_", fig_key, "_results.tex")

  rm(panel); gc()
}
```

## Per-figure IFE event study plots

```{r ife-event-studies}
for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  fig <- FIGURES[[fig_key]]
  model_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_ife_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"))

  if (!file.exists(model_path)) next

  message("Generating antisemitism IFE event study for: ", fig$name)

  out_ife <- readRDS(model_path)
  p_ife <- plot(out_ife,
    main = paste0("ATT (Antisemitism): ", fig$name, " (IFE)"),
    ylab = "ATT (Antisemitism Rate)", xlab = "Periods Since Treatment",
    cex.main = 1.2, cex.lab = 1.1)
  save_figure(p_ife, paste0("fig_ife_att_antisem_", fig_key), width = 8, height = 6)

  rm(out_ife); gc()
}
```

## Per-figure placebo plots

```{r placebo-plots}
for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  fig <- FIGURES[[fig_key]]
  placebo_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_placebo_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"))

  if (!file.exists(placebo_path)) next

  message("Generating antisemitism placebo plot for: ", fig$name)

  out_placebo <- readRDS(placebo_path)
  p_placebo <- plot(out_placebo,
    main = paste0("Placebo Test (Antisemitism): ", fig$name),
    ylab = "ATT (Antisemitism Rate)", xlab = "Periods Since Treatment",
    cex.main = 1.2, cex.lab = 1.1)
  save_figure(p_placebo, paste0("fig_placebo_antisem_", fig_key), width = 8, height = 6)

  rm(out_placebo); gc()
}
```

## Cross-figure ATT forest plot (antisemitism)

```{r forest-plot}
if (length(forest_data_antisem) > 0) {
  forest_dt <- rbindlist(forest_data_antisem)
  forest_dt[, figure := factor(figure, levels = rev(figure))]

  plot_height <- max(7, nrow(forest_dt) * 0.5 + 2)

  p_forest <- ggplot(forest_dt, aes(x = att, y = figure)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    geom_point(size = 3, color = "darkgreen") +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ci_lo, xmax = ci_hi), height = 0.25,
                   color = "darkgreen") +
    labs(x = "ATT (Antisemitism, MC Estimator)",
         y = NULL,
         title = "Antisemitism ATT Across Political Figures",
         subtitle = "Matrix Completion estimator with 95% CI") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
    )

  save_figure(p_forest, "fig_forest_antisem_comparison", width = 10, height = plot_height)
  print(p_forest)
  message("Antisemitism forest plot saved.")
}
```

## Cross-figure summary table

```{r cross-figure-table}
if (length(forest_data_antisem) > 0) {
  summary_dt <- rbindlist(forest_data_antisem)
  summary_dt[, p_value := 2 * pnorm(-abs(att / se))]
  summary_dt[, `:=`(
    ATT = sprintf("%.4f", att),
    SE  = sprintf("%.4f", se),
    CI  = paste0("[", sprintf("%.4f", ci_lo), ", ", sprintf("%.4f", ci_hi), "]"),
    p   = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "$<$0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_value))
  )]

  tex_lines <- c(
    "\\begin{table}[htbp]",
    "\\caption{Antisemitism ATT Across Political Figures\\label{tab:cross-figure-antisem}}",
    "\\centering",
    "\\begin{tabular}{lcccc}",
    "\\toprule",
    "Figure & ATT & SE & 95\\% CI & $p$-value \\\\",
    "\\midrule"
  )

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(summary_dt))) {
    tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
      paste0(summary_dt$figure[i], " & ",
             summary_dt$ATT[i], " & ",
             summary_dt$SE[i], " & ",
             summary_dt$CI[i], " & ",
             summary_dt$p[i], " \\\\")
    )
  }

  tex_lines <- c(tex_lines,
    "\\bottomrule",
    "\\end{tabular}",
    "\\vspace{2pt}",
    "\\footnotesize\\textit{Note:} ATT estimated via Matrix Completion. ",
    "Outcome: RoBERTa antisemitism probability in non-figure articles. ",
    "Bootstrap standard errors (200 replications).",
    "\\end{table}"
  )

  tex_string <- paste(tex_lines, collapse = "\n")
  save_table(tex_string, "table_cross_figure_antisem")
  message("Cross-figure antisemitism summary table saved.")
}
```

## National antisemitism trend

```{r national-trend}
roberta_files <- list.files(ROBERTA_SCORED_DIR, pattern = "\\.parquet$",
                            full.names = TRUE)

if (length(roberta_files) > 0) {
  message("Loading ", length(roberta_files), " RoBERTa-scored files for trends...")

  yearly_np <- list()
  for (rf_f in roberta_files) {
    yr <- gsub(".*roberta_scored_(\\d{4})\\.parquet", "\\1", rf_f)
    dt_yr <- as.data.table(read_parquet(rf_f,
      col_select = c("newspaper_name", "year", "p_antisem")))
    agg <- dt_yr[, .(
      mean_antisem = mean(p_antisem, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_articles = .N
    ), by = .(newspaper_name, year)]
    yearly_np[[yr]] <- agg
    rm(dt_yr, agg); gc()
  }

  np_year <- rbindlist(yearly_np)
  rm(yearly_np); gc()

  national <- np_year[, .(
    mean_antisem = weighted.mean(mean_antisem, n_articles, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_newspapers = uniqueN(newspaper_name),
    n_articles = sum(n_articles)
  ), by = year]
  national <- national[is.finite(mean_antisem)]
  setorder(national, year)

  p_national <- ggplot(national, aes(x = year, y = mean_antisem)) +
    geom_line(color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.15, se = TRUE,
                color = "gray30", fill = "gray80", alpha = 0.3) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Mean Antisemitism (RoBERTa Score)",
         title = "Newspaper Antisemitism in the United States, 1774\u20131960",
         subtitle = "Article-weighted annual average across all newspapers") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40")
    )

  save_figure(p_national, "fig_national_antisemitism_trend", width = 10, height = 6)
  print(p_national)
  message("National antisemitism trend saved.")
}
```

## File listing

```{r file-listing}
message("\n=== Antisemitism Files in Overleaf Figures ===")
antisem_figs <- list.files(OVERLEAF_FIGURES, pattern = "antisem")
cat(paste(antisem_figs, collapse = "\n"), "\n")

message("\n=== Antisemitism Files in Overleaf Tables ===")
antisem_tabs <- list.files(OVERLEAF_TABLES, pattern = "antisem")
cat(paste(antisem_tabs, collapse = "\n"), "\n")

message("\nAntisemitism figures and tables exported.")
```
